plugins.name: permissions
plugins.description: Logs tool calls + sandbox denials + user prompts; provides /permissions-seed, /permissions-audit, /permissions-promote, /sandbox-fix, /permissions-lint, and /permissions-bootstrap-project for tuning settings.json against real usage and recovering from sandbox restrictions

plugins.name: find-docs
plugins.description: Retrieves up-to-date technical documentation, code examples, and performs people/company research using Context7 MCP and Exa AI MCP

plugins.name: session-timeline
plugins.description: Generates self-contained HTML timeline visualizations from Claude Code session transcripts — dark-themed, responsive, with stats, tool usage, subagent cards, and chronological event timeline
